'''Feena D'Asta''' was a politician in the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the daughter of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Ragez D'Asta]]. Noted for her ambition, she was friends with [[Mirith Sinn]], the wife of her father's business partner. In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], she was kidnapped by the combined agents of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa the Hutt]], and replaced with a [[Feena D'Asta (clone)|clone]]. [[Kir Kanos]] later rescued her.

{{Char-stub}}

==Biography==
===On the Interim Ruling Council===
In the years following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Feena's father, [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Ragez D'Asta]], was a member of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]]. Eventually, the Baron grew ill and Feena took his seat on the council. In her time on the Council, D'Asta was noted for her fervor in representing her father's interests.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood">''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood]]''</ref>

===Kidnapped/Cloned===
In [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], [[Y'ull Acib]] took control of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and attempted to infiltrate the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]]. To this end, he had members of Black Sun kidnap Feena D'Asta in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. A clone of D'Asta was planted on the Council by Black Sun. The clone's appearance went unnoticed by the Ruling Council because Black Sun kept the real D'Asta drugged as a source of information. Baron D'Asta had had no contact with his daughter since before the kidnapping and remained unaware of the [[Feena D'Asta (clone)|switch]].<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

===Grappa the Hutt===
Four years after her kidnapping, in a deal with Black Sun member [[Macus Kayniph]], [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] traded a shipment of [[gree spice]] for the real Feena D'Asta. D'Asta was taken to [[Genon]] where she remained a prisoner. During a party celebrating the trade, [[Mirith Sinn]], her old childhood friend, attempted to rescue D'Asta, but was interrupted when [[Massimo]] betrayed her to Grappa.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

Grappa the Hutt slowly lost control of events going on around him, and [[Mirith Sinn]] [[Attack on Grappa the Hutt's fortress|returned to Genon]] with [[Tav Kennede]] and several [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fighters. She forced Grappa to turn over D'Asta and [[Kir Kanos]], who had recently been captured.<ref name="Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood" />

===Reunion with Baron D'Asta===
While the rescue was taking place, Baron D'Asta attacked the new Emperor [[Xandel Carivus]] for the imprisonment of his daughter. The baron was unaware that the Feena imprisoned was actually a clone of his daughter.

===Later years===
[[File:Negociations_CE3.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Feena D'Asta at the peace negotiations]]
{{Quote|My mission here is to hold out the possibility of a peace accord between the "New" Empire and the New Republic|D'Asta, at the negotiations|<ref name="ce3.5" />}}
In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], she represented her father in a meeting with [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], urging him to consider a [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|truce]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as the price of returning their sector into the Empire.<ref name="ce3.2" /> She contacted Mirith Sinn on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to get her help in suggesting the truce to the New Republic.<ref name="Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 3">[[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 3|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 3]]</ref> She eventually met Mirith Sinn and Kir Kanos but the negotiations were [[Ambush at the peace negotiations|interrupted]] when they were attacked by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] of a dissident Imperial faction, the [[Restored Empire]]. Feena D'Asta was killed during the ambush.<ref name="ce3.5" />

Sinn and Kanos later returned Feena's body to her father on [[Nez Peron/Legends|Nez Peron]].<ref name="ce3.5" />
